title: Supreme Mining dimension
description: All Kinds of Mining Dimensions for Every Situation!
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Supreme_Mining_Dimensions/BH_SMD_header.webp)

 

**Why**? Because every pack could use a mining dimension for every situation. Need a cave dimension? Check, need a fake overworld with more luscious colors? Check, Giant Mushroom forests with another forest that the Old growth Taiga could have been? Yes sir! 

  

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Supreme_Mining_Dimensions/BH_SMD_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/Ddraig)

* * *

### ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Supreme_Mining_Dimensions/BH_SMD_banner1.webp)

*   **Tailored Dimensions:** Experience a variety of specialized dimensions crafted to meet different mining challenges and preferences.
    *   **Custom ores:** Many custom ores in the variants that a lot of mods use, new ores other mods do not have, and cross compatibility!
*   **Biome Music:** [Available by resource pack provided as an additional file](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/smd-music) as of version 1.4.2.1 !
*   **Unique Portals**: Utilize distinct portal designs, such as iron-reinforced, gold-reinforced, heated magma, and light obsidian brick portals, to access specific dimensions.
*   **Caverns Dimensions:** Uncover hidden treasures and navigate intricate cave systems in a dedicated dimension designed for cave enthusiasts.
*   **False Overworld:** Immerse yourself in a visually stunning False Overworld dimension boasting vibrant colors and breathtaking landscapes.
*   **Gold-Reinforced Portals**: Journey through Underground, Caverns, and Deep Caverns dimensions using gold-reinforced portals, tailor-made for underground exploration.
*   **Iron-Reinforced Portal**: For those that would love to have some semblance of the natural minecraft worlds, but shaken up a bit
*   **Heated Magma Portal:** For those that would like to survive in a nether-island like dimension with a lava sea
*   **Ender Caves**: Step into a realm of mystery and wonder through light obsidian brick portals that lead to the mesmerizing Ender Caves dimension, make sure to remember where your portal is!.
*   **Personalized Gameplay**: Create a mining experience that suits your preferences and requirements, ensuring every challenge is met with the right dimension.

__The portals are all built just like the basic nether portal, but with the following blocks in place of regular obsidian.:__  
Iron reinforced is reserved for False Overworld

Heated Magma is for Nether Isles  
Gold Reinforced is used for: Underground/ Caverns/ Deep Caverns

Light obsidian bricks are used for Ender caves

Etched wood is used to travel to the strange forests dimensions.

Amber Bricks are used for the Shifted Sands Desert Dimension
